<!-- Keep PRs small and focused on a single vertical slice / concern. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Slice / module touched

<!-- e.g. features/jobs, features/attendance, shared/ui, app -->

- [ ] `features/...`
- [ ] `shared/...`
- [ ] `app/...`
- [ ] tooling / docs

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new capability
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — no behaviour change
- [ ] docs / chore / test

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run format` applied
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] I stayed within my slice; any cross-feature reuse follows the rules in `ARCHITECTURE.md`
- [ ] Updated docs/tests where relevant

## Screenshots / notes

<!-- UI changes: before/after. Anything reviewers should know. -->
